title: BootNotificationRequest
description: Sent by a station to the server after boot to register itself, report firmware/hardware info, and declare capabilities.

firmwareVersion.description: Semantic version of the station firmware.

stationModel.description: Model identifier of the station hardware.

serialNumber.description: Unique serial number of the station unit.

bayCount.description: Number of service bays available at this station.

uptimeSeconds.description: Seconds elapsed since the station last booted.

pendingOfflineTransactions.description: Number of offline transactions queued for synchronization.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier of the station (e.g. 'Europe/London').

bleSupported.description: Whether the station supports BLE communication.

offlineModeSupported.description: Whether the station supports offline session authorization.

meterValuesSupported.description: Whether the station supports reporting meter values.

deviceManagementSupported.description: Whether the station supports the Device Management profile (configuration, firmware update, diagnostics, remote commands).

connectionType.description: Type of network connection used by the station.

signalStrength.description: Signal strength in dBm, or null if not applicable (e.g. Ethernet).
